title: SPM Addition in cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ceifu","text":"SPM Addition in cells for intact cell cross-linking","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: seed cells for 24:00:00 in a 10 cm dish at a density of 6 x 10 6 cells per plate

treat cells for 24:00:00 with 10 µM freshly prepared SPM. SPM (Sigma-Aldrich, Saint Louis, MO, USA) was prepared to a final stock concentration of 200 mM in 0.1 M 3-(N-morpholino)propane sulfonic acid (MOPS)-KOH (pH 7.0)
wash cells with 1X PBS and scrape cells for intact cell cross linking
creator: Joris Van Asselberghs
